word-spell-description: Drag letter tiles to spell the word shown in the picture.
number-match-description: Match numerals to groups by dragging tiles to the right place.
sort-numbers-description: Put the numbers in order from smallest to biggest — or biggest to smallest.

instructions.word-spell: Drag the letters into the boxes to spell the word. Tap the picture or the speaker to hear the word.
instructions.number-match: Drag the tiles to match each number. Tap the number to hear it.
instructions.sort-numbers: Put the numbers in order! Drag each number to the right place.
